svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="xl0WNBUNqlUcKr-Nb6-X"> <mxGraphModel dx="2548" dy="1109" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" mermaidData="{
 "data": "flowchart TD
 %% Define Styles
 classDef startend fill:#1B5E20,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff,font-weight:bold,rx:10,ry:10;
 classDef decision fill:#FFCA28,stroke:#F57F17,stroke-width:2px,color:#000,font-weight:bold;
 classDef screen fill:#E8F5E9,stroke:#4CAF50,stroke-width:2px,color:#000,rx:5,ry:5;
 classDef action fill:#FFFFFF,stroke:#2E7D32,stroke-width:1px,color:#2E7D32,stroke-dasharray: 5 5;
 classDef database fill:#B0BEC5,stroke:#78909C,stroke-width:2px,color:#000;

 %% Nodes
 Start([Buka Aplikasi / Splash Screen]) ::: startend
 CheckAuth{Apakah User<br/>Sudah Login?} ::: decision
 
 %% Auth Flow
 Login[Halaman Login] ::: screen
 Register[Halaman Daftar] ::: screen
 Forgot[Halaman Lupa Sandi] ::: screen
 
 %% Main Flow (Bottom Nav)
 Home[Beranda / Home Screen] ::: screen
 Cart[Keranjang Belanja] ::: screen
 Orders[Riwayat Pesanan] ::: screen
 Profile[Profil & Pengaturan] ::: screen
 
 %% Sub-Screens
 Detail[Detail Produk] ::: screen
 Checkout[Halaman Checkout] ::: screen
 Fav[Obat Favorit] ::: screen
 EditProfile[Edit Profil & Alamat] ::: screen
 
 %% Database
 DB[(Firebase / Firestore)] ::: database
 
 %% End
 EndLogout([Keluar Aplikasi]) ::: startend

 %% Routing Logic
 Start --> CheckAuth
 CheckAuth -- Belum --> Login
 CheckAuth -- Sudah --> Home
 
 Login -- Klik Daftar --> Register
 Register -- Berhasil --> DB
 Register -- Kembali --> Login
 Login -- Lupa Sandi --> Forgot --> Login
 Login -- Berhasil Login --> Home
 
 %% Bottom Nav Connections
 Home <-->|Bottom Nav| Cart
 Home <-->|Bottom Nav| Orders
 Home <-->|Bottom Nav| Profile
 
 %% Home to Detail
 Home -- Pilih Obat --> Detail
 Detail -- Klik '+ Keranjang' --> Cart
 Detail -- Klik '❤️ Favorit' --> DB
 
 %% Cart to Checkout
 Cart -- Lanjut Pembayaran --> Checkout
 Checkout -- Input Alamat & Bayar --> Konfirmasi{Data Valid?} ::: decision
 Konfirmasi -- Ya --> DB
 Konfirmasi -- Tidak --> Checkout
 DB -- Pesanan Berhasil --> Orders
 
 %% Profile Actions
 Profile -- Edit Data --> EditProfile --> DB
 Profile -- Lihat Favorit --> Fav
 Profile -- Toggle (EN/ID, Dark Mode) --> AppUI[Update UI State] ::: action
 Profile -- Klik Keluar --> EndLogout --> Login",
 "config": null
